name: padi.test.propagate
title: Propagate test profile
comment: A development/test profile that demonstrates the per-property propagate flag: writes to propagated properties are pushed to all active connections; non-propagated properties stay on the writing node's capability and are never visible to peers.

properties.name: bulletin
properties.description: Posted by the provider and PROPAGATED - every connected consumer sees it

properties.name: draft
properties.description: Written by the provider but NOT propagated - it stays on the provider's capability; consumers can never see it

properties.name: ping
properties.description: A counter the provider bumps, PROPAGATED - consumers echo it back, proving the round trip

properties.name: feedback
properties.description: Written by the consumer and PROPAGATED - the provider sees it

properties.name: notes
properties.description: The consumer's private notes, NOT propagated - they stay on the consumer's capability; the provider can never see them

properties.name: echo
properties.description: The consumer's PROPAGATED echo of ping
